# -- Phase 175 family-local (non-shared) parameters  -  created by FamilySymbolAuthor ----------
# These are created directly via FamilyManager.AddParameter inside the family document and
# are NOT shared parameters (no GUID). They are documented here for visibility only.
# STING_SYMBOL_STD          INTEGER  instance  Code of the active standard: IEC=0, ANSI=1, BS=2, NFPA=3, CIBSE=4
# STING_SHOW_IEC_BOOL       YES/NO   type      Formula: if(STING_LOD_COARSE_VISIBLE, STING_SYMBOL_STD = 0, false)
# STING_SHOW_ANSI_BOOL      YES/NO   type      Formula: if(STING_LOD_COARSE_VISIBLE, STING_SYMBOL_STD = 1, false)
# STING_SHOW_BS_BOOL        YES/NO   type      Formula: if(STING_LOD_COARSE_VISIBLE, STING_SYMBOL_STD = 2, false)
# STING_SHOW_NFPA_BOOL      YES/NO   type      Formula: if(STING_LOD_COARSE_VISIBLE, STING_SYMBOL_STD = 3, false)
# STING_SHOW_CIBSE_BOOL     YES/NO   type      Formula: if(STING_LOD_COARSE_VISIBLE, STING_SYMBOL_STD = 4, false)
# STING_PLAN_HALF_W_FT      LENGTH   type      = Width / 2  -  drives symbolic curve X extent
# STING_PLAN_HALF_D_FT      LENGTH   type      = Depth / 2  -  drives symbolic curve Y extent
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
